pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'Error404_Smart_Hospital'
    }

    tools {
        maven 'MAVEN_HOME'
        jdk 'JAVA_HOME'
    }

    stages {

        stage('Workspace Cleanup') {
            steps {
                cleanWs()
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout Source Code') {
            steps {
                git(
                    branch: 'feature/appointment-module',
                    url: 'https://github.com/VIGNESHWARAN-USER/Automation-Testing-Project.git'
                )
            }
        }

        stage('Build & Execute Automation Suite') {
            steps {

                echo "Executing Maven Test Suite..."

                catchError(buildResult: 'UNSTABLE', stageResult: 'FAILURE') {

                    bat 'mvn clean test'

                }
            }
        }

        stage('Publish Cucumber Report') {
            steps {

                cucumber(
                    fileIncludePattern: '**/target/cucumber-report.json'
                )

            }
        }

        stage('Publish Extent Report') {
            steps {

                publishHTML([
                    allowMissing: true,
                    alwaysLinkToLastBuild: true,
                    keepAll: true,
                    reportDir: 'target/ExtentReport',
                    reportFiles: 'Spark.html',
                    reportName: 'Extent Report'
                ])

            }
        }

        stage('Publish TestNG Surefire Report') {
            steps {

                publishHTML([
                    allowMissing: true,
                    alwaysLinkToLastBuild: true,
                    keepAll: true,
                    reportDir: 'target/surefire-reports',
                    reportFiles: 'index.html',
                    reportName: 'TestNG Surefire Report'
                ])

            }
        }

        stage('Publish Allure Report') {
            steps {

                allure([
                    includeProperties: false,
                    jdk: '',
                    commandline: 'Allure',
                    results: [[path: 'target/allure-results']]
                ])

            }
        }
    }

    post {

        always {

            junit 'target/surefire-reports/*.xml'

            archiveArtifacts(
                artifacts: '''
                    test-output/**,
                    target/surefire-reports/**,
                    target/ExtentReport/**,
                    target/allure-results/**,
                    logs/**,
                    test-output/screenshots/**,
                    target/cucumber-report.html,
                    target/cucumber-report.json
                ''',

                allowEmptyArchive: true
            )

            echo "Pipeline completed with status: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
        }
    }
}
